description_long: This object is a prominent university entrance sign for Universidad Autónoma de Chihuahua, featuring large, bold metallic letters mounted atop a long, rectangular concrete base. The sign includes a university emblem on the left side, rendered in relief and visually distinct from the text. The base is set on a reddish-brown paved platform, providing a clear boundary and visual contrast to the sign. Two human figures are present for scale, emphasizing the sign's substantial size and public visibility. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, focusing attention on the institution's name and logo. The structure is intended as a landmark, likely placed at a main entrance or highly trafficked area of the campus.
description: A large, modern university entrance sign for Universidad Autónoma de Chihuahua, with bold metallic letters and a concrete base on a reddish-brown paved platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full university name, emblem, and two human figures for scale.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the sign's narrow depth and the length of the concrete base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mirrored text and the back of the emblem, with the platform still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the sign's thickness and the paved platform.
attribute_building_signage: Raised metallic letters spelling 'UNIVERSIDAD AUTONOMA DE CHIHUAHUA' and a university emblem on the left, both mounted on the concrete base.
attribute_entryway_design: No entryway is present; the structure is a solid sign with no doors or entry features.
